close_reason: Cleanup complete - removed old shard-aware functions, updated tests
description:
## Goal
Final cleanup after recovery refactor - remove all vestigial shard-aware code that's no longer used.

## No Backward Compatibility
We're not maintaining backward compatibility. Old code paths should be deleted, not deprecated.

## Code to Remove

### In `log_recovery_planning_phase.ex`:
- `group_logs_by_shard/2`
- `all_logs_by_shard/1`
- `evaluate_shard_combinations/2`
- `evaluate_single_shard_combination/3`
- `calculate_cross_shard_version_vector/1`
- Any range_tag type references no longer needed

### In `telemetry.ex`:
- `healthy_teams`/`degraded_teams` range_tag tracking (lines 75-76)
- Update or remove shard-based telemetry events

### Tests to Remove:
- Any tests for `group_logs_by_shard`
- Any tests for `evaluate_shard_combinations`
- Any tests expecting stored shard_tags in log descriptors
- Tests for per-shard quorum validation

### Types to Clean Up:
- LogDescriptor type if it was `[Bedrock.range_tag()]`
- Any shard-aware recovery types

## Verification
- `mix compile --warnings-as-errors` - no unused function warnings
- `mix test` - all tests pass
- No references to removed functions remain
title: Cleanup: Remove old shard-aware recovery machinery
